title: CreateMembersRequest
description: Request to invite member accounts to a behavior graph

GraphArn.description: The ARN of the behavior graph.

Message.description: Customized message text to include in the invitation email message.
Message.example: Please join our security behavior graph.

DisableEmailNotification.description: If set to true, invitation emails are not sent.

Accounts.description: The list of AWS accounts to invite to become member accounts.
